error.signature: [rviz2] Display 'LaserScan' has encountered an error: Transform [Error]

verdict.summary: RViz2 display shows transform error. The display's fixed frame does not match the TF tree, or TF data is missing.

dead_ends.action: Change RViz Fixed Frame to 'map' without a map publisher running
dead_ends.why_fails: If no node publishes map frame, all displays depending on it will error

dead_ends.action: Ignore the error assuming it is cosmetic
dead_ends.why_fails: RViz displays with transform errors render nothing or render in wrong positions

workarounds.action: Set Fixed Frame to a frame that exists in your TF tree
workarounds.how: Set Fixed Frame to 'base_link' or 'odom' — check available frames with ros2 run tf2_tools view_frames

workarounds.action: Verify TF is being published at sufficient rate
workarounds.how: ros2 topic hz /tf  # should be >= 10 Hz for smooth display

workarounds.action: Check the topic name and message type for each display
workarounds.how: Click the display in RViz, verify Topic matches ros2 topic list output

preceded_by.condition: Missing TF frames cause all RViz displays to error
